title: Requirements Analysis: Email Attachments vs Google Drive Links
response:
Feedback Summary (2 comments):

General Comments:
1. I prefer approach 2 (hybrid approach), please revise this requirement to use the approach 2.

Specific Text Comments:
1. "**User Story:** As a system administrator, I want ...": There is no system admin role. The only user is employee

comments.comment: There is no system admin role. The only user is employee
comments.selectedText: **User Story:** As a system administrator, I want the system to gracefully handle attachment size limitations, so that email sending remains reliable.

comments.comment: I prefer approach 2 (hybrid approach), please revise this requirement to use the approach 2.
